channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Morocco Defeats World Cup Co-Host Canada 3-0, Reaches Quarterfinals
item.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice as Morocco beat Canada 3-0 in the World Cup round of 16 on Saturday, becoming the first African nation to advance to the quarterfinals.

item.title: Mourners call for vengeance as Iran's slain leader's funeral begins
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's flag-draped casket was displayed in Tehran, with millions expected at the funeral.

item.title: America 250: David Muir on national parks and Native tribes that call them home
item.description: As the U.S. marks its 250th birthday this Fourth of July, celebrating national parks and the Native tribes that inhabit them is a fitting tribute.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (July 5)
item.description: Highlights from the Emmy-winning program's July 5 broadcast, hosted by Jane Pauley.
